en: You can have up to 6 units in your squad
es: Puedes tener hasta 6 unidades en tu escuadrón

en: After the battle, the leaders retire to their quarters to rest.
es: Después de la batalla, las líderes se retiran a sus cuarteles para descansar.

en:
All but one units have been disabled.

Swap your other units around by dragging said unit over them.

Swap repeatedly until you can line up your units for a pincer.
es:
Se han deshabilitado todas las unidades, excepto una.

Empuja tus otras unidades arrastrando la unidad habilitada sobre ellas.

Empuja repetidamente hasta que puedas alinear tus unidades para cercar al enemigo.

en: Greaves of Clay Stomping On A Spirit’s Head Forever
es: Grebas de Arcilla Pisoteando Eternamente la Cabeza de un Espíritu

en: Branded and cast out for naming one corruption too many, you take the long road to Outer Heaven...
es: Branded and cast out for naming one corruption too many, you take the long road to Outer Heaven...

en: The road to the capital runs through starving villages and fat magistrates.
es: The road to the capital runs through starving villages and fat magistrates.

en: At Outer Heaven the cast out and the hunted spirit-folk take you in.
es: At Outer Heaven the cast out and the hunted spirit-folk take you in.

en: A tower stands on the border that steals the memory of any who climb it.
es: A tower stands on the border that steals the memory of any who climb it.

en: Hunted on every road, the band goes down instead of out, into the buried world beneath the...
es: Hunted on every road, the band goes down instead of out, into the buried world beneath the...

en: A drowned city of the forgotten dead, ruled by a spirit-magistrate as cruel as any above.
es: A drowned city of the forgotten dead, ruled by a spirit-magistrate as cruel as any above.

en: To go deeper the band must cross the burning veins of the underworld.
es: To go deeper the band must cross the burning veins of the underworld.

en: A labyrinth built from the harvested dead, turn after turn of them.
es: A labyrinth built from the harvested dead, turn after turn of them.

en: A place where bodies are made and unmade.
es: A place where bodies are made and unmade.

en: They rouse an ancient bound spirit, who looks at them with something like pity.
es: They rouse an ancient bound spirit, who looks at them with something like pity.

en: A pull none of them can name draws the band toward the center of the buried world.
es: A pull none of them can name draws the band toward the center of the buried world.

en: In the deepest black the band falters.
es: In the deepest black the band falters.

en: They corner and kill the corrupt spirit-lord who rules the deep.
es: They corner and kill the corrupt spirit-lord who rules the deep.

en: The floor of the world gives way.
es: The floor of the world gives way.

en: A running war against the wardens of the Court Above.
es: A running war against the wardens of the Court Above.

es: Cornered with no way out, the band wakes its true nature, names blazing in the dark of the...

en: They climb back to a surface that looks the same and is not.
es: They climb back to a surface that looks the same and is not.

en: For the first time the Court Above speaks to them directly.
es: For the first time the Court Above speaks to them directly.

es: Beyond the reach of any law, the band must decide for itself what justice means, now that...

es: They take the war to heaven's hands on the ground, hunting the magistrates and ministers who are...

es: They discover the Court manufactures false heroes to replace the ones it reaps, and find...

en: A flawless made-hero, stronger than any of them, is sent to bring them in.
es: A flawless made-hero, stronger than any of them, is sent to bring them in.

en: A brother everyone loved falls, and the war stops being a cause and becomes a wound.
es: A brother everyone loved falls, and the war stops being a cause and becomes a wound.

en: The Court reaches to turn the wheel early, to unmake them and start again.
es: The Court reaches to turn the wheel early, to unmake them and start again.

es: At its height Outer Heaven becomes a true power, a fire the wronged can see from far away.

es: The Court Above extends its hand, not as a fist but as mercy.

en: Sent to fight heaven's wars, the first brothers die gloriously, exactly as designed.
es: Sent to fight heaven's wars, the first brothers die gloriously, exactly as designed.

en: Committed and scattered, the band watches the Court drop its mask at last.
es: Committed and scattered, the band watches the Court drop its mask at last.

en: The brothers die one after another in wars no one can win.
es: The brothers die one after another in wars no one can win.

es: The survivors are cornered, hunted, and betrayed by the very empire they agreed to serve.
